title: Hornet Removal in Gravesend, Brooklyn | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Gravesend, Brooklyn. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Gravesend homes and businesses. Call now!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Gravesend residents, especially in the dense residential neighborhoods between Ocean Parkway and Coney Island Avenue. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services to protect your family and property from aggressive stinging insects. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from homes, yards, and commercial properties throughout Gravesend.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Gravesend for years with proven hornet removal expertise and same-day emergency services. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective methods to completely remove hornet nests while protecting your property, and we guarantee our work with follow-up inspections to ensure your home stays hornet-free.
localContext: Gravesend's mix of single-family homes, brick row houses, and garden apartments near landmarks like the Gravesend Cemetery and along tree-lined streets create ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, overhangs, and mature trees. The neighborhood's proximity to parks and the historic Gravesend Neck Road area means hornets often build nests in both residential and semi-commercial properties throughout the spring and summer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services in Gravesend. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours of arrival, depending on nest size and location. We understand the urgency of hornet problems and prioritize rapid response to keep your family safe.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, safe removal of the hornet nest, treatment of the surrounding area to prevent re-infestation, and proper disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height. We provide upfront quotes before beginning work with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my family and pets in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven techniques that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We take extra precautions in Gravesend's densely populated residential areas and provide clear safety instructions for re-entry to treated areas, typically within a few hours.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in Gravesend, and when should I call for removal?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity in Gravesend peaks from late spring through early fall, with nests growing largest in August and September. Call immediately if you notice hornet activity or spot a nest, as colonies become more aggressive as they grow. Early removal is safer and often less expensive than waiting until nests reach full size.
